title: limonium globuliferum
intro: Limonium globuliferum, also known as Globe Sea Lavender, is a flowering plant in the Plumbaginaceae family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to be effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Limonium globuliferum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and act as an expectorant to relieve congestion. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, have been used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
